title: Vibrant Powder Blue Paper Honeycomb Ball Garland (2 Meters) 1 Piece - Elegant Party Decoration for Events and Celebrations, 7'
features: VIBRANT POWDER BLUE COLOR: Add a pop of festive flair to your events with our striking powder blue paper honeycomb ball garland, perfect for setting the tone and creating a lively atmosphere at any party or celebration.
LONG GARLAND: Measuring a generous 2 meters in length, this gorgeous, versatile decoration comes as a single, continuous piece, making it easy to hang and creating an instant impact.

ELEGANT PAPER HONEYCOMB DESIGN: Our unique honeycomb ball garland features intricately crafted paper honeycomb balls that expand into a stunning 3D effect, adding depth and sophistication to your party décor.

IDEAL FOR MULTIPLE OCCASIONS: A stylish and eye-catching accent, this powder blue paper honeycomb ball garland is perfect for weddings, birthdays, holiday gatherings, baby showers, or any event in need of a touch of elegance and pizzazz.

SIMPLE SETUP & REUSABLE: Designed for easy installation and removal, simply attach the provided string to any surface to hang the garland; reusable and easy to store, it's the ideal choice for lasting event decorations and recurring celebrations.
